extra.reason: Migrated existing frontend ORPC-covered IPC calls and verified focused tests/build.
Added a starter prompt archetype catalog, surfaced curated chips in PromptInput, and verified prompt seeding plus source refs.
Added Lucide icon keys to every starter prompt, rendered featured prompt icons in chips, and verified prompt-input behavior.

Removed VITE_SENTRY_DSN from ops/secrets/secrets.sops.json and three CI workflow env blocks (.github/workflows/build.yaml, build-cache-test.yaml, .depot/workflows/build.yaml). No code references remained; the value was a leftover from the legacy frontend Sentry init replaced by the IPC-forwarded OTEL pipeline. Committed 84ca581c and pushed to develop. Note: the GitHub repo secret named VITE_SENTRY_DSN should also be deleted manually via repo settings (Actions secrets) — sops only controls the encrypted file, not GitHub Actions secrets.

Fixed all 43 cargo check errors. Root cause: Rust 2024 edition made std::env::set_var/remove_var unsafe (return ()). Two fixes: (1) removed invalid `?` on `()` in test files (e2e_runtime, env/config, env/mod); (2) wrapped set_var/remove_var calls in unsafe blocks in non-test code (age, ensure_secret, evolve/mod, main, secrets, permissions, scanner, utils). Also fixed 2 matches! `ref` binding-mode errors in evolve/mod.rs, and restored the SUBMITTED_FEEDBACK_DSN path segment in feedback_url_for_config that was dropped in a prior refactor (test env::tests::feedback_url_from_env now passes). cargo check --tests passes clean. 522/524 tests pass; 2 failures in bootstrap::import are pre-existing and unrelated (libgit2 fixture expects master branch). Committed 8cd451a9 and pushed to develop.

Implemented drift-review redesign on manualEvolve step: DriftBanner, DriftReview card (Plain English AI summaries / File changes toggle), per-file rows with M/A/D glyphs + line stats + actions menu, split Build & Test button, inline Discard confirm. Verified via unit tests, tsc, oxlint, and storybook screenshots.
Fixed: hasChanges gating in computeCurrentStep + Stepper; tests added; full unit suite green (169).
Merged review surface; AI-session story added; tsc 0, 169 unit tests green; verified AI-session variant renders banner-less Proposed changes card.
Built + verified: session continuity confirmed (lifecycle.rs reuses evolution_id), tsc 0, 169 tests green, AI footer screenshot confirms Discard/Refine with AI/Build & Test.
